memoryArtifacts.headline: Sichelgaita af Salerno (sitting) with Robert Guiscard

popularStory.headline: Sykelgaite de Salerne
popularStory.description:
Sykelgaite de Salerne ou Sichelgaite (v. 1041-27 mars 1090) était une princesse lombarde, seconde épouse de Robert Guiscard, duc d'Apulie.

Biographie

Sichelgaita, l’aînée des filles de Guaimar IV de …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sikelgaita of Salerno於大約1040年出生在義大利坎帕尼亞薩利爾諾時，她的父親Guaimar IV Principe di Capua Salerno Calabria e Apulia28歲，母親Gemma Dite Capoue de Marsico27歲。她於大約1058年與Roberto "Giscardo" de Hauteville在義大利普格利亞結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1090年7月27日在義大利卡拉布里亞科森扎瑟特拉洛享年51歲，埋葬在義大利拉其福洛希農卡希諾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sikelgaita of Salerno于大约1040年出生在意大利坎帕尼亞薩利爾諾时，她的父亲Guaimar IV Principe di Capua Salerno Calabria e Apulia28岁，母亲Gemma Dite Capoue de Marsico27岁。她于大约1058年与Roberto "Giscardo" de Hauteville在意大利普格利亞结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1090年7月27日在意大利卡拉布里亞科森扎瑟特拉洛享年51岁，埋葬在意大利拉其福洛希農卡希諾。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Salerno
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Antonio, Sal, Salvatore, Pasquale, Carmine, Rocco, Aldo, Nunzio, Enrico, Francesco, Gaspare.
Italian (southern): habitational name from the city of Salerno in Campania.

variants.name: Salierno
meanings: Italian (mainly Campania): variant with metaphony of   Salerno  .

en.lifeSummary: When Sikelgaita of Salerno was born about 1040, in Salerno, Campania, Italy, her father, Guaimar IV Principe di Capua Salerno Calabria e Apulia, was 28 and her mother, Gemma Dite Capoue de Marsico, was 27. She married Roberto "Giscardo" de Hauteville about 1058, in Puglia, Italy. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 27 July 1090, in Cetraro, Cosenza, Calabria, Italy, at the age of 51, and was buried in Cassino, Frosinone, Lazio, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sikelgaita of Salerno est née environ 1040, à Salerno, Campania, Italie, son père, Guaimar IV Principe di Capua Salerno Calabria e Apulia, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Gemma Dite Capoue de Marsico, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Roberto "Giscardo" de Hauteville environ 1058, à Puglia, Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 juillet 1090, à Cetraro, Cosenza, Calabria, Italie, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à Cassino, Frosinone, Lazio, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sikelgaita of Salerno um 1040 in Salerno, Campania, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guaimar IV Principe di Capua Salerno Calabria e Apulia 28 und ihre Mutter Gemma Dite Capoue de Marsico 27. Sie hat um 1058 in Puglia, Italien Roberto "Giscardo" de Hauteville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. Juli 1090 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Cetraro, Cosenza, Calabria, Italien und wurde in Cassino, Frosinone, Lazio, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sikelgaita of Salerno è nata il circa 1040 nel Salerno, Campania, Italia, sua padre, Guaimar IV Principe di Capua Salerno Calabria e Apulia, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Gemma Dite Capoue de Marsico, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Roberto "Giscardo" de Hauteville circa 1058, nel Puglia, Italia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 27 luglio 1090, nel Cetraro, Cosenza, Calabria, Italia, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolta a Cassino, Frosinone, Lazio, Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Sikelgaita of Salernoが約1040年にイタリアカンプアニアサラーノで生まれた時，父Guaimar IV Principe di Capua Salerno Calabria e Apuliaは28歳，母Gemma Dite Capoue de Marsicoは27歳であった。約1058年にイタリアプウグリアでRoberto "Giscardo" de Hautevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1090年7月27日にイタリアカラブリアコセンザセトラロで51歳で死去し，イタリアラズオフロシノンカシノにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sikelgaita of Salerno(이)가 대략 1040년 이탈리아 캠파니아 살일른오에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guaimar IV Principe di Capua Salerno Calabria e Apulia(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gemma Dite Capoue de Marsico(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1058년 이탈리아 푸그리야에서 Roberto "Giscardo" de Hauteville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1090년 7월 27일 이탈리아 캘라브리아 코센자 세트라로에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 라지오 프로시넌 캐시노에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sikelgaita of Salerno nasceu aproximadamente 1040, em Salerno, Campania, Itália, seu pai, Guaimar IV Principe di Capua Salerno Calabria e Apulia, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Gemma Dite Capoue de Marsico, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Roberto "Giscardo" de Hauteville aproximadamente 1058, em Puglia, Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 27 de julho de 1090, em Cetraro, Cosenza, Calabria, Itália, com 51 anos, e foi sepultada em Cassino, Frosinone, Lazio, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sikelgaita of Salerno родилась около 1040 г. в местности сеилирно, кампаня, Италия, её отцу по имени Guaimar IV Principe di Capua Salerno Calabria e Apulia было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Gemma Dite Capoue de Marsico, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roberto "Giscardo" de Hauteville около 1058 г. в местности пугля, Италия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 27 июля 1090 г. в местности кетраро, косенза, калабря, Италия в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности кассино, фросиноун, лазио, Италия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sikelgaita of Salerno nació aproximadamente 1040, en Salerno, Campania, Italia, su papá, Guaimar IV Principe di Capua Salerno Calabria e Apulia, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Gemma Dite Capoue de Marsico, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Roberto "Giscardo" de Hauteville aproximadamente 1058, en Puglia, Italia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 27 de julio de 1090, en Cetraro, Cosenza, Calabria, Italia, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultada en Cassino, Frosinone, Lazio, Italia.
